languages.text: "Напрасная патетика, Себериан. Твоя истина была искусным творением, замершим в вечности..."
"Your histrionics are pointless, Seberian. Your truth was an intricate work of artifice, frozen in eternity..."
languages.original_text: "Напрасная патетика, Себериан. Твоя истина была искусным творением, замершим в вечности..."

traits.locale_text: "Your histrionics are pointless, Seberian. Your truth was an intricate work of artifice, frozen in eternity..."

"Your histrionics are pointless, Seberian. Your truth was an intricate work of artifice, frozen in eternity..."

languages.text: «Déjate de aspavientos, Seberian. Tu verdad era un elaborado artificio, congelado en la eternidad...».
languages.original_text: "Your histrionics are pointless, Seberian. Your truth was an intricate work of artifice, frozen in eternity..."

traits.locale_text: «Déjate de aspavientos, Seberian. Tu verdad era un elaborado artificio, congelado en la eternidad...».

languages.text: “你这歇斯底里的表演毫无意义，塞贝里安。你所谓的“真相”，不过是精心编织的假象，已被定格在永恒中……”
languages.original_text: "Your histrionics are pointless, Seberian. Your truth was an intricate work of artifice, frozen in eternity..."

traits.locale_text: “你这歇斯底里的表演毫无意义，塞贝里安。你所谓的“真相”，不过是精心编织的假象，已被定格在永恒中……”

languages.text: « Inutile de faire un esclandre, Seberian. Votre réalité était une œuvre complexe d'artifice, figée dans l'éternité... »
languages.original_text: "Your histrionics are pointless, Seberian. Your truth was an intricate work of artifice, frozen in eternity..."

languages.text: "Şamatacılığın anlamsız Seberian. Senin gerçeğin, sonsuzlukta donup kalmış karmaşık bir hilekârlığın eseriydi..."
languages.original_text: "Your histrionics are pointless, Seberian. Your truth was an intricate work of artifice, frozen in eternity..."

traits.locale_text: "Şamatacılığın anlamsız Seberian. Senin gerçeğin, sonsuzlukta donup kalmış karmaşık bir hilekârlığın eseriydi..."

languages.text: "Das theatralisches Getue ist sinnlos, Seberian. Deine Wahrheit war ein kompliziertes Kunstwerk, in Ewigkeit erstarrt ..."
languages.original_text: "Your histrionics are pointless, Seberian. Your truth was an intricate work of artifice, frozen in eternity..."

traits.locale_text: "Das theatralisches Getue ist sinnlos, Seberian. Deine Wahrheit war ein kompliziertes Kunstwerk, in Ewigkeit erstarrt ..."

languages.text: 「あなたの演技は無駄だ、シベリア。あなたの真実とは、永遠に凍りついた巧妙な作り物だった…」
languages.original_text: "Your histrionics are pointless, Seberian. Your truth was an intricate work of artifice, frozen in eternity..."
